positive: A symmetrical, stylized mandala design featuring abstract nature elements: intertwining jungle vines, geometrically perfect lotus flowers, and celestial crescent moons. The style should be a sophisticated blend of Art Deco and Pacific Northwest tattoo flash, rendered in highly contrasting black and deep teal ink on a pure white background. Use clean, bold linework and negative space to emphasize the symmetrical composition. The design must be centered, highly detailed, and suitable for repeating apparel prints, providing a strong silhouette for maximum impact. Golden ratio composition, flat vector look, crisp edges, minimalist background.
